2605.22738.title: Proxy-Based Approximation of Shapley and Banzhaf Interactions
2605.22738.paper_summary: Shapley and Banzhaf interactions capture the complex dynamics inherent in modern machine learning applications. However, current estimators for these higher-order interactions trade off between speed and accuracy. To overcome this limitation, we introduce ProxySHAP. ProxySHAP reconciles the high sample efficiency of tree-based proxy models with a principled path to consistency via residual correction. On a theoretical level, we derive a polynomial-time generalization of interventional TreeSHAP to compute exact interaction indices for tree ensembles, successfully bypassing exponential tree-depth dependencies in prior methods. Furthermore, we formally analyze the residual adjustment strategy, characterizing the specific conditions under which Maximum Sample Reuse (MSR) corrects proxy bias without its variance scaling exponentially with interaction size. Extensive benchmarking demonstrates that ProxySHAP sets a new state-of-the-art standard for approximation quality, including in large-scale applications with thousands of features. By achieving the lowest error in both small- and large-budget regimes, ProxySHAP significantly outperforms the prior best estimators ProxySPEX and KernelSHAP-IQ, while also delivering superior performance on downstream explainability tasks.
2605.22738.paper_summary_zh: Shapley 和 Banzhaf 互動捕捉了現代機器學習應用中固有的複雜動態。<lb/>然而，目前這些高階互動的估計器在速度和準確性之間存在權衡。<lb/>為了克服這一限制，我們引入了 ProxySHAP。<lb/>ProxySHAP 將基於樹的代理模型的高樣本效率與通過殘差校正實現一致性的原則性路徑相結合。<lb/>在理論層面上，我們推導出一種多項式時間的干預 TreeSHAP 的廣義形式，以計算樹集成的精確互動指數，成功地避開了先前方法中指數樹深度的依賴性。<lb/>此外，我們正式分析了殘差調整策略，描述了最大樣本重用（MSR）在何種特定條件下能夠校正代理偏差，而不會隨著互動大小的增加而指數增長其方差。<lb/>廣泛的基準測試顯示，ProxySHAP 在近似質量上設立了新的最先進標準，包括在具有數千個特徵的大規模應用中。<lb/>通過在小型和大型預算範疇內實現最低的誤差，ProxySHAP 顯著超越了先前最佳的估計器 ProxySPEX 和 KernelSHAP-IQ，同時在下游可解釋性任務上也表現出色。
2605.22738.author: Santo M. A. R. Thies et.al.
2605.22738.authors: Santo M. A. R. Thies, Hubert Baniecki, R. Teal Witter, Eyke Hüllermeier, Maximilian Muschalik, Fabian Fumagalli
